properties.description: Flags bursts of successful high-impact directory administration operations by one actor.
properties.query:
let lookback = 1h;
let operationThreshold = 5;
AuditLogs
| where TimeGenerated > ago(lookback)
| where Result =~ 'success'
| where OperationName in~ ('Add member to role', 'Add eligible member to role', 'Update conditional access policy', 'Delete conditional access policy', 'Reset user password')
| extend Actor=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.userPrincipalName), ActorIp=tostring(InitiatedBy.user.ipAddress)
| where isnotempty(Actor)
| summarize OperationCount=count(), Operations=make_set(OperationName, 20), Targets=make_set(tostring(TargetResources[0].displayName), 20) by Actor, ActorIp, bin(TimeGenerated, 15m)
| where OperationCount >= operationThreshold

tuning.knownLimitations: Approved bulk administration and emergency response can create false positives.
tuning.requiredExclusions: Approved automation identities and emergency changes require time-bound exclusions.
